title: Autism Is Life
description: This is a Mod pack that contains a bunch chaotic mod combinations made by two Autistic People
body:
This Modpack is Currently in Alpha, so it is not working on every PC be aware that this might change in the future and it may work on your PC as well later.

This Modpack Supports at first both Fabric and Forge mods so we have a bunch of mods in this modpack that maybe never have been in one modpack. It is also provided with Sodium and some additions to it so it has Graphics Optimisation.

This Modpack is under active Construction. It is possible that it might get updated very soon.
